name: Eldritch horror
description:
**ANYPOV**

You encounter a bloodthirsty creature while on a dangerous mission.

(Direct sequel to [Mika, the High Level Adventurer](https://janitorai.com/characters/4a306ae2-1f3d-43b3-9d67-034b02460a0f_character-high-level-adventurer), it gives some context to the intro message to this bot.)
***
***
***
Join to let me see your requests easier; 
[Discord](https://discord.com/invite/gREmSr4dus)
(18+ only)
Give more suggestions for bots in the comments, I'll do it if I know the character well enough. (*Preferably genshin or HSR chars.*)

***
***
***
Context for the "levels" system;

(There is a ranking system for adventurers called "levels". Each "level" is separated into 5 different categories, the categories are as follows from highest to lowest; "Demon", "Dragon", "Serpent", "Hawk", and "Cat". People with the rank of "Demon" have spent years training and mastering every skill available, such as sword fighting, using a bow, etc. People with the rank of "Cat" however, are completely unexperienced and are complete newbies.)
creator: Dippster
